mechanics.name: X-Ray Attack
mechanics.description: A devastating, cinematic attack that breaks bones and does massive damage. Costs 3 full bars of Super Meter.

mechanics.name: Combo Breaker
mechanics.description: Interrupts an opponents combo and pushes them away. Costs 2 bars of Super Meter.

mechanics.name: Run
mechanics.description: Sprint towards the opponent to close the distance quickly or extend combos. Drains the Stamina meter.

mechanics.name: Interactables
mechanics.description: Use background objects to attack the opponent, escape corners, or extend combos. Drains Stamina.
